mission.title: Install and Configure Opengemini on Kubernetes
mission.description: openGemini is a cloud-native distributed time-series database designed for high concurrency, performance, and scalability. Installing it allows you to efficiently store and analyze massive telemetry data in your Kubernetes environment.

steps.title: Install openGemini via binary release
steps.description:
Download and install openGemini:
```bash
curl -Lo openGemini.tar.gz https://github.com/openGemini/openGemini/releases/download/v1.3.0/openGemini-1.3.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf openGemini.tar.gz
cd openGemini-1.3.0-linux-amd64
```

steps.title: Start openGemini in standalone mode
steps.description:
Start the standalone server:
```bash
./ts-server --config ./conf/openGemini-standalone.conf &
```
The server will start on port 8086 (InfluxDB-compatible).

steps.title: Deploy on Kubernetes via operator (optional)
steps.description:
For Kubernetes deployment, use the openGemini operator:
```bash
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openGemini/openGemini-operator/main/config/crd/bases/opengemini.io_opengeminis.yaml
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openGemini/openGemini-operator/main/config/manager/manager.yaml
```
See https://github.com/openGemini/openGemini-operator

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Test the InfluxDB-compatible API:
```bash
curl -i http://localhost:8086/ping
curl -G 'http://localhost:8086/query' --data-urlencode 'q=SHOW DATABASES'
```

resolution.summary: openGemini time series database is running and accessible via InfluxDB-compatible API on port 8086.

upgrade.title: Download latest release
upgrade.description:
Stop the server, download the new version, and restart:
```bash
pkill ts-server
curl -Lo openGemini.tar.gz https://github.com/openGemini/openGemini/releases/latest/download/openGemini-linux-amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf openGemini.tar.gz
```

troubleshooting.title: Port 8086 already in use
troubleshooting.description:
Check for existing processes:
```bash
lsof -i :8086
```
Change the port in the config file if needed.

troubleshooting.title: High memory usage
troubleshooting.description: Tune memory settings in the config file under `[data]` section.

troubleshooting.title: InfluxDB client not connecting
troubleshooting.description: openGemini is InfluxDB v1.x compatible. Use InfluxDB v1 client libraries and line protocol.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a running Kubernetes cluster and kubectl installed and configured to interact with it.
